children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: There shall be submitted with the annual budget of the United States a comprehensive statement of estimated requirements during the ensuing fiscal year for appropriations from the Fund.
not less than 40 percent shall be used for Federal purposes; and
not less than 40 percent shall be used to provide financial assistance to States.
